{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017152876F4FC84C923F7746D7D"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618924691692569406","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"干嘛没有了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773921891,"group_id":"7589233002824092697","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8wuYl7lV9+K09/Xka8YwugxGNWojryvAEq1xi3Hw0tt","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1508991933103327","user_name":"喜欢黑山猪的红颜武皇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1508991933103327","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589233002824092697","book_info":{"abstract":"杨风穿越到了平行世界的龙国，继承了顶级珠宝集团。
而一次偶然的宴会上，杨风认识了杨蜜，并且双方阴差阳错地互相喝错了各自的红酒。结果，再一睁眼，两人竟然互换了身体！
而这时，杨风觉醒了系统，只要完成了系统的所有任务，就能够重新换回身体！
杨风也和换了身体的杨蜜约法三章，在换回身体之前，一定要维持各自的事业！
而系统给出的第一个任务就是让正在担任音乐节目的杨蜜，亲自上场获得总冠军！
而随着杨米不断完成各种不可思议的任务，身为女儿身，却有着无数男人都没有的潇洒气质的他（她），不断斩获了各个女明星的芳心！
热芭：“蜜姐，我怕黑，你陪我，好不好？”
古力纳扎：“蜜姐，能不能帮我涂一下腿上的防晒啊？”
宋祖尔：“蜜姐，咱们一起去泡温泉？我买了一套非常漂亮的泳衣！”
张紫枫：“蜜姐……”
看着这些对自己毫不设防的女明星们，杨风只想说一句：“我真的不是杨蜜啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/16ee94756f747f66839c40cae1ecb1dd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"佛曰涅磐","author_id":"","book_id":"7589233002824092697","book_name":"娱乐：我和杨蜜互换了身体！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#401808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5178人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7611883177585426969","read_count":"5178","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"113445"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"30","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,娱乐圈,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/16ee94756f747f66839c40cae1ecb1dd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182128&x-signature=9eux8ItC1b9nZCNlST79bQIFfJ4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1547707440695022","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"29"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017152876F4FC84C923F7746D7D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"
